description: Gran Grif is the largest and most powerful criminal organization in the Artibonite department of Haiti, based in Savien. Founded around 2016 by former congressman Prophane Victor, it engages in murder, rape, mass abduction, forced child recruitment, and other violent abuses. The gang was responsible for 80% of reported civilian deaths in Artibonite in 2022 and perpetrated the 2024 Pont-Sondé attack that killed at least 115 people. It has been designated a terrorist organization by the Dominican Republic and the United States.
